session.name: History workspace photoshop refactor — to-do 7 pivot

goal.original: Execute to-do 7 (PIVOT) of docs/plans/2026-04-24-history-workspace-photoshop-refactor.md — rip out strategies + channel bus + MpiToolActionBar, replace with flat mediator in MpiGroupHistoryBlock + 5 self-contained MpiToolOptions* components.
goal.summary: Sub-commits 1a + 1b complete. MpiOptionSelector extended with `buttons` variant. 5 MpiToolOptions* components created under Organisms/ (not Compounds/ — tier corrected post-creation because 3 of them import MpiOptionSelector). preloadStyles + types.js registered. Sub-commits 2 (rewrite MpiHistoryTools), 3 (Block rewrite + canvas viewer surgery), 4 (deletions + gallery + smoke test) remain.

completed: Sub-commit 1b: 5 MpiToolOptions* components (Crop, ManualMask, AutoMask, Upscale, Interpolate) + preloadStyles + types.js typedefs + Organism tier correction
pending: Sub-commit 2: Rewrite MpiHistoryTools (accept `mode: 'image'|'video'` prop, build internal tool list, sub-menu via MpiOptionSelector buttons variant, setMode/setDisabled/getActiveMode API, emit only `activate`). Plan §1 lines 234–246.

Sub-commit 3a: Expose new methods on MpiCanvasViewer (setMaskBrushMode, clearMask, invertMask, commitMask, runCrop, setAutoMaskModel, setAutoMaskUseBox, runAutoMaskDetect, commitAutoMask, getAutoMaskThumbsEl). Plan §2 + intel in sub-commit log at top of plan.
Sub-commit 3b: Delete 3 MpiToolActionBar.mount sites in MpiCanvasViewer (lines ~135, 154, 263). Remove barContainer prop.

Sub-commit 3c: Rewrite MpiGroupHistoryBlock — inline viewer mount, `mountOptions(mode)` mediator replacing setActiveTool, inline strategy helpers, _hasPromptOps() gate for PromptBox. Plan §4 lines 275–295 has exact mediator code.

Sub-commit 4: Delete strategies/ + MpiToolActionBar/ dirs, remove CSS + typedefs, grep-verify zero hits for stale names, add dev gallery demos for 5 components + buttons variant, manual smoke test matrix. Plan §9 + lines 386–394.
To-do 8 (merged into 7 §7/§8), 9 (cleanup), 10 (smoke test matrix), 11 (docs/rules updates — requires user approval per cardinal rule 3).

next_action.description: Read the plan file (top sub-commit progress log + to-do 7 §1 lines 234–246), then read current MpiHistoryTools.js (~92 lines) and MpiOptionSelector.js post-1a to confirm the `buttons` variant API. Then rewrite MpiHistoryTools per plan §1: drop `tools` prop, accept `mode: 'image'|'video'`, build internal tool list (see skill args / plan §1 for exact IMAGE_TOOLS + VIDEO_TOOLS lists), mount MpiOptionSelector `buttons` variant for grouped defs, add setMode / setDisabled / getActiveMode API, emit only `activate`. Update types.js typedef. Ask user if MpiHistoryTools gallery demo should be added/updated in js/pages/components.js (deferred to sub-commit 4 otherwise).

key_decisions: Q1=A: delete MpiToolActionBar entirely. Apply button lives inside each MpiToolOptions* component.
Q3: no MpiToolOptionsSelection component. Right-click MpiContextMenu (from to-do 2) handles compare/delete.

Tier correction: MpiToolOptions* moved from Compounds/ → Organisms/ because 3 of them import MpiOptionSelector (a Compound). Compounds cannot import Compounds; Organisms can. All references (file paths, CSS, typedefs, imports) updated.
Dev gallery demos deferred to sub-commit 4 — too coupled to live viewer instances to demo in isolation.
constraints: Plan invariants at lines 67–76 are load-bearing — read before coding.
No cancel button anywhere in any MpiToolOptions* (radio-style switching handles discard via destroy).
PromptBox visibility driven by `_hasPromptOps()` check against commandRegistry `promptRequired` flag, NOT strategy type.
Never commit to git unless user explicitly asks.
Plan §7 SUPERSEDED / §8 SUPERSEDED / §9 SUPERSEDED at bottom of plan are history-only — DO NOT implement.
Canvas viewer is an Organism that imports Compounds — flagged as BAD IMPLEMENTATION in its own doc. Do not fix during this pivot; orthogonal concern.
MpiAutoMaskThumbs is owned by canvas viewer; MpiToolOptionsAutoMask re-parents its DOM node. On compound destroy, do NOT destroy the thumbs — detach only.

resume_prompt: Read docs/handoffs/2026-04-24-18-00-history-photoshop-pivot.json, then read the active plan at docs/plans/2026-04-24-history-workspace-photoshop-refactor.md — pay particular attention to the sub-commit progress log at the top of the plan and the PIVOT NOTICE at line 52. Sub-commits 1a + 1b are complete. You are resuming at sub-commit 2: rewrite js/components/Compounds/MpiHistoryTools/MpiHistoryTools.js per plan §1 (lines 234–246 of to-do 7). Do NOT start coding until you have (a) read the plan, (b) read the current MpiHistoryTools.js (~92 lines), (c) read MpiOptionSelector.js to confirm the `buttons` variant API you will call, and (d) briefed the user on your exact plan and waited for a `go`. Follow CLAUDE.md cardinal rules and the .claude/rules/components.md + events.md sub-agent briefings. Caveman mode is active this session.
